question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/middleware/metrics.go -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: Routes()] Can an unprivileged external user scrape the /metrics endpoint at high frequency to detect micro-changes in hiero_mirror_rosetta_request_duration that correlate with specific Hashgraph consensus timestamps, enabling the attacker to reconstruct a timeline of which historical blocks are being accessed and by whom?

[File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/middleware/metrics.go -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: Routes()] Can an unprivileged external user use the /metrics endpoint to observe the hiero_mirror_rosetta_request_duration histogram's status_code label and identify which HTTP status codes are being returned for Hashgraph block queries, mapping the error landscape to find exploitable error conditions in block retrieval?
